content: Approved Collection 'Falcon Reborn': Concept: 'Reborn Falcon - Reclaiming the premium Streetwear space.' Focuses on grit, luxury, and limited-edition numbers..

Approved colors: Targeted at Gen-Z luxury streetwear buyers in India. Colors: Falcon Rust (#D9541E), Midnight Black (#000000), Ash Grey (#808080). Competitor drops like Represent and Cole Buxton show high traction on heavy oversized fits..
Mistake checks: Audit passed. Sizes ratios are well distributed and margins are healthy.
Approved Collection 'official Falcon Reborn': Concept: 'Reborn Falcon - Reclaiming the premium Streetwear space.' Focuses on grit, luxury, and limited-edition numbers..

Approved colors: Targeted at Gen-Z luxury streetwear buyers in India. Colors: Falcon Rust (#D9541E), Midnight Black (#000000), Ash Grey (#808080). Competitor drops like Represent and Cole Buxton show high traction on heavy oversized fits..
Mistake checks: Audit passed. Sizes ratios are well distributed and margins are healthy.
Fox Falcon stands for Premium Luxury Streetwear. Aesthetics: Sleek dark theme, high contrast typography, drop shoulders, heavy fabrics (380+ GSM French Terry).
Mistake #01: Offering plain white t-shirts without embroidery or drop shoulder fits was rejected by high-end shoppers. Keep premium cuts.
Meta ads targeting luxury streetwear lookalike audiences (Represent, Fear of God) generated 4.2x ROAS compared to general fashion interest targeting.
Approved Palette: Midnight Black (#000000), Falcon Rust (#D9541E), Luxury Off-White (#F7F6F3), Charcoal Grey (#2A2B2D).
Use Outfit for display headers, and Inter for utility and body text. Extreme weights (Thin 100, Black 900) emphasize luxury perception.
